title: Simplest Fabric Elevator
description: Simplest Elevator block mod. Craft the block, use it. Nothing more.
body:
# Simplest Fabric Elevator

## Setup

Install this mod using [Modrinth's app](https://modrinth.com/app) or [AT Launcher](https://atlauncher.com/)

## Usage

You can craft the Elevator Block using this recipe : 

![Elevator block crafting recipe](https://github.com/RiverFolf/simplest-fabric-elevator/blob/main/screenshots/crafting.png?raw=true)

Place them with at least 2 blocks of space between them, vertically. 

Like so :

![Elevator blocks placement example](https://github.com/RiverFolf/simplest-fabric-elevator/blob/main/screenshots/elevator_blocks.png?raw=true)


You can press "Jump" to go UP, "Crouch" to go DOWN. Enjoy 🙂
